# Anti-Patterns — Defenses of Faith

**Anti-Pattern 1: Faith As Virtue. Faith is treated as a virtue. It is not.**

**Anti-Pattern 2: Science Cannot Answer Everything. This is a gap that does not need God.**

**Case: The God of the Gaps. Using God to explain what science has not yet explained.**

**Case: The Moral Relativism. Claiming that without God, there is no morality.**

**Case: The Special Pleading. Religious claims get a pass that other claims do not.**

**Case: The Persecution. Claiming Christians are persecuted when they are the majority.**

**Case: The Straw Man. Claiming critics misrepresent Christianity. Harris knows the Bible well.**
**Case: The No True Scotsman. Saying true Christians do not do X. This defends no one.**
**Case: The Faith as Foundation. Claiming that without faith you cannot have values. This is false.**
**Case: The Intolerance Accusation. Accusing critics of being intolerant while demanding tolerance for faith.**
**Case: The Slippery Slope. Claiming that criticizing religion leads to persecution.**
**Case: The Sacred Cow. Treating religion as off-limits for criticism.**
**Case: The Hitchens Challenge. Hitchens said: what can be asserted without evidence can be dismissed without evidence.**
**Case: The Pascal Wager. Believing in God as a hedge is intellectually dishonest.**
